deck: Day 21-2 Flashcards - BPDU Guard & BPDU Filter.apkg

cards.front: Does a PortFast-enabled port send BPDUs?
What happens when a PortFast-enabled port receives a BPDU?
cards.back: It will revert to acting like a regular STP port (without PortFast)

cards.front: [Feature] err-disables a switch port if it receives an STP BPDU.
If a BPDU Guard-enabled port receives a BPDU, what happens to the port?

Enable BPDU Guard on a port:
SW1(config-if)# [...]

Enable BPDU Guard by default:
SW1(config)# [...]
When BPDU Guard is enabled by default, which ports is it active on?

Disable BPDU Guard on a specific port (after it has been enabled by default):
SW1(config-if)# [...]

Manually re-enable an err-disabled port:
SW1(config-if)# [...]
SW1(config-if)# [...]
Which feature can automatically re-enable err-disabled ports?

View the status of ErrDisable Recovery on the switch:
SW1# [...]
The default ErrDisable Recovery interval is [time].

Modify the ErrDisable Recovery interval:
SW1(config)# [...]

Enable ErrDisable Recovery for a particular cause:
SW1(config)# [...]
[Feature] prevents a switch port from sending BPDUs.

Enable BPDU Filter on a port:
SW1(config-if)# [...]

Enable BPDU Filter by default:
SW1(config)# [...]

Disable BPDU Filter on a port (after it has been enabled by default):
SW1(config-if)# [...]
BPDU Filter has been enabled in interface config mode. What happens if the port receives a BPDU?
BPDU Filter has been enabled in global config mode. What happens if the port receives a BPDU?
cards.back: PortFast and BPDU Filter are disabled, and the port operates as a normal STP port

cards.front: When BPDU Filter is enabled by default, which ports is it active on?
